signIn.title: Sign in to Monize
signIn.ssoIntro: This application uses Single Sign-On for authentication.
signIn.noMethods: No authentication methods are configured. Please contact the administrator.

demo.credentialsNote: Credentials are pre-filled. All data resets daily at 4:00 AM UTC.

toasts.welcomeDemo: Welcome to Monize Demo! Data resets daily at 4:00 AM UTC.

register.title: Create your account
register.signInLink: sign in to your existing account

delegateNotice.title: This email already exists as a shared user.
delegateNotice.body: Someone has already invited <mono>{email}</mono> as a delegate on their account. Enter the delegate password you were given to join that access to this new account. If the password is wrong, no account will be created.

register.agreement: By creating an account, you agree to our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>

twoFactor.title: Secure Your Account
twoFactor.requiredSubtitle: Two-factor authentication is required by the administrator.
twoFactor.optionalSubtitle: Add an extra layer of security to your account.

preferences.title: Set Your Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Choose your language and the currency Monize should use by default. You can change these later in Settings.

errors.delegatePasswordIncorrect: The delegate password is incorrect. Please try again.
errors.createFailed: Unable to create account. Please try again.
errors.firstNameMax: First name must be less than 100 characters
errors.lastNameMax: Last name must be less than 100 characters

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with that email address, we have sent a password reset link. Please check your inbox.

toasts.failed: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.

changePassword.title: Change Your Password
changePassword.subtitle: Your password must be changed before you can continue.

callback.title: Completing sign in...
callback.subtitle: Please wait while we authenticate you

backupCodes.title: Save Your Backup Codes
backupCodes.description: If you lose access to your authenticator app, you can use one of these codes to sign in. Each code can only be used once.
backupCodes.warning: Store these codes in a safe place. You will not be able to see them again. If you generate new codes, the previous ones will be invalidated.
backupCodes.confirm: I have saved these backup codes

file.title: Monize 2FA Backup Codes
file.usedOnce: Each code can only be used once.
file.storeSafe: Store these codes in a safe place.

twoFactorVerify.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactorVerify.promptBackup: Enter one of your backup codes.
twoFactorVerify.promptTotp: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
twoFactorVerify.rememberDevice: Don't ask again on this browser for 30 days

validation.backupFormat: Backup code must be in XXXX-XXXX format

twoFactorSetup.confirmSubtitle: Re-enter your current password to start two-factor authentication setup.
twoFactorSetup.setupSubtitle: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (e.g., Google Authenticator, Authy).
twoFactorSetup.codeLabel: Enter the 6-digit code from your app

stepUp.title: Confirm it's you
stepUp.unavailable: This action requires extra verification. Finish setting up your account password (or sign in with your identity provider) before accessing this setting.
stepUp.oidcPrompt: Sign in again with your identity provider to confirm it's you. You'll be brought right back here.
stepUp.totpPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
stepUp.passwordPrompt: Enter your current account password to continue.
